Sub:   Link of Transcript of Conference Call 
  
Dear Sir/Madam, 
  
This is in continuation to our letter dated October 29, 2024. In this regard, please find below 
link of transcript of conference call held on October 29, 2024. 
 
https://iglonline.net/uploads/announcement/PhillipCap-Indraprastha-Oct29-2024.pdf 
 
This is in compliance of Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure 
Requirements) Regulations, 2015. 
  
Thanking you, 
 
Yours sincerely, 
for Indraprastha Gas Limited 
  
   
 
 
(Vivek Sahay)
